description_long: This nightstand is constructed from wood with a natural grain pattern visible across all surfaces, giving it a warm, classic appearance. The top surface is broad and flat, suitable for placing lamps, books, or other small items. The front features two open shelves on the right side, providing accessible storage, while the left side is enclosed, possibly for structural support or additional hidden storage. The back panel is raised with three rectangular cutouts, adding a subtle design element and possibly serving as a cable management feature. The legs are solid panels extending down from the tabletop, offering stability and a modern, blocky aesthetic. There are no visible handles or decorative carvings, emphasizing a functional and minimalist design.
description: A wooden nightstand with a broad top, two open shelves, and a raised back panel with cutouts, featuring a minimalist, functional design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the solid wood grain panel and the raised back panel with cutouts.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the raised back panel with three rectangular cutouts and the open structure beneath the tabletop.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the continuous wood grain and the solid side panel.
description_view_3: Front view revealing two open shelves on the right and a solid panel on the left, with the flat tabletop and raised back panel.
attribute_placement_relative_to_other_ur: against a wall or beside a bed
